name: Red Red (Bean Stew)
ingredients: Black-eyed peas; Palm oil; Onion; Plantain
instructions: Soak beans; Boil till soft; Fry plantain in oil; Mix beans with stew base.

name: Banku and Grilled Tilapia
ingredients: Corn dough; Cassava dough; Tilapia; Pepper
instructions: Mix doughs with water; Cook vigorously; Grill fish; Serve with shito/pepper.

name: Fufu and Goat Light Soup
ingredients: Cassava; Plantain; Goat meat; Garden eggs
instructions: Boil cassava and plantain; Pound together; Boil meat with spices; Combine.

name: Garden Egg Stew with Yam
ingredients: Garden eggs; Palm oil; Koobi; Yam
instructions: Boil garden eggs and mash; Fry onions and koobi; Mix; Boil yam separately.

name: Waakye with Shito
ingredients: Rice; Black-eyed peas; Sorghum leaves; Oil
instructions: Boil beans with sorghum; Add rice; Cook together; Serve with shito.

name: Tuzaafi (TZ) and Ayoyo
ingredients: Corn flour; Cassava flour; Ayoyo leaves; Dawadawa
instructions: Cook flour into soft paste; Boil ayoyo leaves with dawadawa; Serve hot.

name: Kenkey and Fried Fish
ingredients: Fermented corn dough; Fried fish; Pepper; Onion
instructions: Steam fermented dough in corn husks; Deep fry fish; Grind pepper.

name: Omo Tuo and Groundnut Soup
ingredients: Rice; Groundnut paste; Chicken; Tomato; Onion
instructions: Boil rice soft and mold into balls; Simmer groundnut paste with chicken and tomato base; Serve together.

name: Boiled Plantain and Kontomire Stew
ingredients: Plantain; Cocoyam leaves; Melon seeds (Agushi); Palm oil; Smoked fish
instructions: Boil plantain (apem); Sauté onion and agushi in palm oil; Add chopped cocoyam leaves and smoked fish; Simmer.

name: Jollof Rice with Grilled Chicken
ingredients: Rice; Tomato paste; Oil; Chicken; Onion; Spices
instructions: Fry onion and tomato paste; Add rice and water/stock; Cook till soft; Serve with grilled chicken.

name: Angwamo with Fried Egg
ingredients: Rice; Oil; Salted beef (Tolo beef); Onion; Egg
instructions: Fry onion and salted beef in oil; Add water and rice; Cook till dry; Serve with fried egg and pepper.

name: Mpoto Mpoto (Mashed Yam)
ingredients: Yam; Palm oil; Onion; Dried Herrings; Pepper
instructions: Boil yam with onion and pepper; Mash partially; Add palm oil and herrings; Simmer into thick porridge.

name: Hausa Koko and Koose
ingredients: Millet dough; Ginger; Pepper; Cowpea flour; Oil
instructions: Ferment millet dough with spices; Boil into porridge; Deep fry seasoned cowpea batter into balls (koose).

name: Roasted Plantain and Peanuts
ingredients: Ripe Plantain; Roasted Peanuts
instructions: Roast plantain over charcoal; Serve with roasted peanuts.

name: Okro Soup with Banku
ingredients: Okra; Garden eggs; Banku (Corn/Cassava); Fish; Palm Oil
instructions: Chop okra and boil with baking soda (optional); Make soup base with fish and palm oil; Add okra; Serve with Banku.

name: Konkonte and Groundnut Soup
ingredients: Cassava flour (Dried); Groundnut paste; Chicken; Tomato
instructions: Cook dried cassava flour into dark sticky dough (Face the Wall); Serve with rich groundnut soup.

name: Kelewele (Spicy Fried Plantain)
ingredients: Ripe Plantain; Ginger; Pepper; Spices; Oil
instructions: Dice ripe plantain; Marinate in ginger/pepper mix; Deep fry until golden brown.

name: Gari Foto
ingredients: Gari; Tomato Stew; Eggs; Sardines; Oil
instructions: Moisten Gari slightly; Mix with spicy tomato gravy; Add scrambled eggs or sardines.

name: Aprapransa (Palm Nut Corn Mush)
ingredients: Roasted Corn flour; Palm Nut Soup; Crabs; Fish
instructions: Mix roasted corn flour into boiling palm nut soup base until thick; Serve with crabs/meat.

name: Rice Water Porridge
ingredients: Rice; Water; Evaporated Milk; Sugar
instructions: Boil rice until very soft and soupy; Add milk and sugar to taste.

name: Fried Yam with Turkey Tail (Chofi)
ingredients: Pona Yam; Turkey Tail; Pepper Sauce; Oil
instructions: Slice and deep fry yam; Fry seasoned turkey tail (fatty meat); Serve with hot pepper.

name: Palava Sauce with Boiled Yam
ingredients: Cocoyam leaves; Melon seeds (Agushi); Palm oil; Yam; Smoked fish
instructions: Boil yam until soft; Sauté agushi and onions in palm oil; Add chopped cocoyam leaves (kontomire); Simmer.

name: Light Soup with Fresh Fish
ingredients: Garden eggs; Tomatoes; Fresh Tilapia; Onion; Pepper
instructions: Boil vegetables and blend into light broth; Simmer with fresh fish (no oil added); Season with spices.

name: Bulgur Wheat Jollof
ingredients: Bulgur wheat; Tomato stew; Chicken breast; Vegetables
instructions: Prepare tomato stew base with minimal oil; Add bulgur wheat and water; Cook until fluffy; Serve with lean chicken.

name: Aboboi (Bambara Beans) with Tatale
ingredients: Bambara beans; Ripe plantain; Ginger; Sugar; Corn flour
instructions: Boil bambara beans until soft (add sugar); Mash ripe plantain with spices and fry into pancakes (tatale).

name: Fried Rice (Ghana Style)
ingredients: Rice; Soy sauce; Oil; Eggs; Sausage; Vegetables
instructions: Stir-fry cold rice with soy sauce veggies and chopped meat; Add scrambled eggs.

name: Tom Brown Porridge
ingredients: Roasted corn flour; Groundnuts; Milk; Sugar
instructions: Roast corn and groundnuts until brown; Mill into powder; Boil into thick porridge; Add milk/sugar.

name: Sobolo (Hibiscus Drink)
ingredients: Hibiscus leaves; Ginger; Pineapple; Sugar; Cloves
instructions: Boil hibiscus leaves with spices and pineapple skin; Strain; Add sugar (lots) and cool.

name: Bofrot (Puff Puff)
ingredients: Flour; Sugar; Yeast; Oil; Nutmeg
instructions: Mix flour batter with sugar and yeast; Let rise; Deep fry balls in hot oil.

name: Gari Soakings
ingredients: Gari; Evaporated milk; Sugar; Groundnuts
instructions: Mix gari with cold water; Add milk, sugar, and roasted groundnuts; Eat immediately.

name: 3to (Mashed Plantain)
ingredients: Semi-ripe plantain; Palm oil; Boiled egg; Pepper
instructions: Boil plantain and mash; Mix with hot palm oil and onions; Serve with boiled eggs.

name: Kyinkyinga (Beef Kebab)
ingredients: Beef strips; Suya spice (Kuli-kuli powder); Oil
instructions: Coat beef in spicy peanut powder; Skewer and grill over open fire; Brush with oil.

name: Kosua ne Meko (Egg and Pepper)
ingredients: Boiled Egg; Tomato; Onion; Pepper
instructions: Hard boil egg; Grind fresh pepper, tomato, and onion; Slit egg and stuff with sauce.

name: Tubani (Steamed Bean Pudding)
ingredients: Bean flour (Black-eyed pea); Shea butter; Pepper
instructions: Whip bean flour mixture; Wrap in leaves and steam; Serve with shea butter and pepper dip.

name: Nkate Cake (Peanut Brittle)
ingredients: Roasted groundnuts; Sugar
instructions: Melt sugar until caramelized; Stir in roasted peanuts; Flatten and cut into bars.

name: Oblayo (Corn Grits Porridge)
ingredients: Corn grits; Milk; Sugar
instructions: Boil corn grits until soft; Serve with milk and sugar.

name: Ghanaian Salad
ingredients: Lettuce; Eggs; Baked beans; Corned beef; Mayo
instructions: Toss fresh vegetables with baked beans and corned beef; Dress generously with mayonnaise.

name: Fruit Salad
ingredients: Pawpaw; Pineapple; Watermelon; Banana
instructions: Dice fresh fruits; Mix and chill.

name: Grilled Tilapia (Lite)
ingredients: Fresh Tilapia; Ginger; Garlic; Natural Spices
instructions: Marinate fish in natural spices (no salt); Grill without oil.

name: Wrewre Soup with Fufu
ingredients: Melon seeds (Wrewre); Fufu; Chicken; Ginger
instructions: Roast and blend melon seeds; Simmer into soup base; Serve with Fufu.

name: Kulikuli (Peanut Rings)
ingredients: Groundnut paste; Spices; Oil
instructions: Extract oil from paste; Mix with spices; Deep fry crunchy rings.

name: Atadwe Milk (Tiger Nut Pudding)
ingredients: Tiger nuts; Rice flour; Sugar; Evaporated milk
instructions: Blend tiger nuts to extract milk; Cook with rice flour and sugar into pudding.

name: Assana (Corn Drink)
ingredients: Crushed corn; Sugar; Milk
instructions: Ferment corn; Boil until caramelized/brown; Serve cold with milk.

name: Yele Kakro (Fried Yam Balls)
ingredients: Yam; Onion; Pepper; Oil
instructions: Mash boiled yam with spices; Form balls; Deep fry until golden.

name: Kokonte with Palm Nut Soup
ingredients: Cassava flour (Kokonte); Palm nut soup; Goat meat
instructions: Cook kokonte dough; Serve with rich palm nut soup.

name: Rice Balls and Groundnut Soup
ingredients: Rice; Groundnut paste; Chicken
instructions: Boil rice soft and mash; Serve with spicy peanut soup.

name: Fante Kenkey and Fish
ingredients: Corn dough; Plantain leaves; Fried fish
instructions: Steam corn dough in plantain leaves (sour); Serve with fried fish.

name: Plantain Chips
ingredients: Unripe plantain; Oil; Salt
instructions: Slice unripe plantain thinly; Deep fry; Salt lightly.

name: Fried Gizzard (Spicy)
ingredients: Chicken gizzards; Pepper; Onion; Oil
instructions: Boil gizzards; Sauté in spicy pepper sauce.

name: Brukina (Millet & Milk)
ingredients: Millet; Yoghurt/Milk; Sugar
instructions: Steam millet grains; Mix with sweetened fermented milk.
